faqs.question: What causes drain flies in Tottenville homes?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, pipes, and sewage systems. In Tottenville's older homes and buildings, deteriorating pipes and infrequently used drains create ideal breeding conditions. Moisture buildup in basements and bathrooms, common in waterfront properties, also attracts these pests.

faqs.question: How long does drain fly treatment take in Tottenville?
faqs.answer: Most drain fly treatments in Tottenville take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of affected drains. Our technicians inspect all potential breeding sites, apply professional-grade treatments, and provide prevention recommendations. Follow-up visits may be scheduled if needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Are drain fly treatments safe for my Tottenville home?
